creator: np@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried a T320 card on latest main as of today but did not run into any problems, probably because there weren't any netlink listeners at the time of attach.  That said, the attached patch looks correct and I'm planning to commit it as soon as tinderbox completes.  I'll set author to the following:

Author: ScottD <biscuits.carry.0j@icloud.com>
